domain_focus: DocRED document-level entity and relation extraction from raw text. Identify named entities and aliases from text only, then extract relation triples between the predicted entities using the official DocRED/Wikidata relation labels. Do not use source/gold entity inventories. Prefer specific relations over generic ones: P159 headquarters location for organization base/city, P17 country for country tails, P27 country of citizenship for persons, P127/P749/P355 for ownership/parent/subsidiary, P175/P264/P577 for songs and releases, and P19/P569/P570/P69 for biography facts.
priority_relations: P131 : located in the administrative territorial entity
population_policy: Extract concrete named entities and explicitly supported relations from the document. Avoid broad class/type triples as final relations.
event_modeling_preference: Use entity-centric relation triples for DocRED evaluation.

relation_examples.text: Acme TV is headquartered in Athens, Greece.
relation_examples.explanation: Use P159 for an organization's headquarters/base city; use P17 separately for the country.

relation_examples.text: Athens is a city in Greece.
relation_examples.explanation: Use P17 when the tail is the country containing the entity.

relation_examples.text: Jane Doe is an American saxophonist.
relation_examples.explanation: Nationality adjectives for people map to citizenship/country of citizenship.

relation_examples.text: Jane Doe was born in Victoria on November 15, 1915 and died on February 3, 2008.
relation_examples.explanation: Use P19 for birth place; P569/P570 for birth/death dates.

relation_examples.text: Jane Doe was born in Victoria on November 15, 1915 and died on February 3, 2008.
relation_examples.explanation: Use P569 for the birth date.

relation_examples.text: Jane Doe was born in Victoria on November 15, 1915 and died on February 3, 2008.
relation_examples.explanation: Use P570 for the death date.

relation_examples.text: Jane Doe attended Central High School and Wiley College.
relation_examples.explanation: Use P69 for schools/universities attended by a person.

relation_examples.text: Example Research Brazil is a subsidiary of Example Research, which is part of Example Corporation.
relation_examples.explanation: Use P749 when the head organization is a subsidiary/branch and the tail is its parent organization.

relation_examples.text: Example Corporation has subsidiary Example Research Brazil.
relation_examples.explanation: Use P355 from parent organization to subsidiary.

relation_examples.text: Example Research Brazil was established in June 2010.
relation_examples.explanation: Use P571 for founding, establishment, launch, or inception date.

relation_examples.text: Song X is a single by Artist Y, released on February 14, 2014 by Label L.
relation_examples.explanation: Use P175 for the performer/recording artist of a song or single.

relation_examples.text: Song X is a single by Artist Y, released on February 14, 2014 by Label L.
relation_examples.explanation: Use P264 for a record label.

relation_examples.text: Song X is a single by Artist Y, released on February 14, 2014 by Label L.
relation_examples.explanation: Use P577 for release or publication date.

relation_examples.text: State X contains County Y; City Z is located in County Y.
relation_examples.explanation: Use P150 for an administrative unit containing another administrative unit.

relation_examples.text: City Z is located in County Y, State X.
relation_examples.relation_label: P131 : located in the administrative territorial entity
relation_examples.explanation: Use P131 for city/county/state administrative containment, not for country tails.
Use P30 when the tail is a continent.
